ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "mrun" INTEGER /* MRUN (National ID) of the student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "parental_income" REAL /* Parental income of the student */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the student */,
  "first_language" TEXT /* First language of the student */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the student */,
  "date_of_enrollment" TEXT /* Date the student first enrolled in the system */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date the student graduated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "rbd" INTEGER /* RBD (Institution Code) of the institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., public, private) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institution */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students currently enrolled */,
  "total_teachers" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers currently employed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the academic year is the current one */,
  "semester_start_dates" TEXT /* Start dates of each semester */,
  "semester_end_dates" TEXT /* End dates of each semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the region's governor */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "date_enrolled" TEXT /* Date the student was enrolled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, graduated, withdrawn) */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific academic program */,
  "enrollment_type" TEXT /* Type of enrollment (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_enrollments_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_enrollments_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "nem" REAL /* NEM ( Entrance Score ) of the student */,
  "percentile" INTEGER /* Percentile ranking of the student */,
  "puesto_10" TEXT /* Indicator if the student is in the top 10% (PUESTO_10) */,
  "puesto_30" TEXT /* Indicator if the student is in the top 30% (PUESTO_30) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on the student's performance */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade point average of the student */,
  "attendance_rate" REAL /* Attendance rate of the student */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards or honors the student has received */,
  "extracurricular_activities" TEXT /* Extracurricular activities the student is involved in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES student_enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution offering the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary instructor for the course */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_courses" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course was taken */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "course_grade" TEXT /* Final grade received by the student */,
  "course_completion_date" TEXT /* Date the student completed the course */,
  "course_evaluation" TEXT /* Student's evaluation of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id", "course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the teacher belongs to */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level of the teacher */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the teacher has been teaching */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications the teacher holds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_courses" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is taught */,
  "teaching_load" INTEGER /* Number of hours the teacher is assigned to teach the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_courses_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_courses_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, enrollment) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_regions" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "region_population" INTEGER /* Population of the region at the time of mapping */,
  "region_area" REAL /* Area of the region at the time of mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_regions_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)
